WITH all_rows AS (
         SELECT 'tra'::text AS company,
            to_jsonb(t.*) AS "row"
           FROM "tra_5-0" t
        UNION ALL
         SELECT 'dra'::text,
            to_jsonb(d.*) AS to_jsonb
           FROM "dra_5-0" d
        UNION ALL
         SELECT 'gt'::text,
            to_jsonb(g.*) AS to_jsonb
           FROM "gt_5-0" g
        )
 SELECT company,
    (("row" ->> 'uuid'::text))::uuid AS uuid,
    (("row" ->> 'date_created'::text))::timestamp with time zone AS date_created,
    ("row" ->> 'aff_id'::text) AS aff_id,
    ("row" ->> 'off_id'::text) AS off_id,
    ("row" ->> 'affiliate'::text) AS affiliate,
    ("row" ->> 'source_id'::text) AS source_id,
    ("row" ->> 'case'::text) AS "case",
    ("row" ->> 'first_name'::text) AS first_name,
    ("row" ->> 'last_name'::text) AS last_name,
    ("row" ->> 'phone'::text) AS phone,
    ("row" ->> 'email'::text) AS email,
    (NULLIF(("row" ->> 'debt_amount'::text), ''::text))::numeric AS debt_amount,
    ("row" ->> 'state'::text) AS state,
    ("row" ->> 'ip'::text) AS ip,
    ("row" ->> 'trans_id'::text) AS trans_id,
    ("row" ->> 'unique_id'::text) AS unique_id,
    ("row" ->> 'url'::text) AS url,
    ("row" ->> 'sub1'::text) AS sub1,
    ("row" ->> 'sub2'::text) AS sub2,
    ("row" ->> 'sub3'::text) AS sub3,
    ("row" ->> 'sub4'::text) AS sub4,
    ("row" ->> 'sub5'::text) AS sub5,
    (NULLIF(("row" ->> 'income'::text), ''::text))::numeric AS income,
    (NULLIF(("row" ->> 'expenses'::text), ''::text))::numeric AS expenses,
    ("row" ->> 'tax_issues'::text) AS tax_issues,
    ("row" - ARRAY['uuid'::text, 'date_created'::text, 'aff_id'::text, 'off_id'::text, 'affiliate'::text, 'source_id'::text, 'case'::text, 'first_name'::text, 'last_name'::text, 'phone'::text, 'email'::text, 'debt_amount'::text, 'state'::text, 'ip'::text, 'trans_id'::text, 'unique_id'::text, 'url'::text, 'sub1'::text, 'sub2'::text, 'sub3'::text, 'sub4'::text, 'sub5'::text, 'income'::text, 'expenses'::text, 'tax_issues'::text]) AS extras
   FROM all_rows;

SELECT userid,
    dbid,
    toplevel,
    queryid,
    query,
    plans,
    total_plan_time,
    min_plan_time,
    max_plan_time,
    mean_plan_time,
    stddev_plan_time,
    calls,
    total_exec_time,
    min_exec_time,
    max_exec_time,
    mean_exec_time,
    stddev_exec_time,
    rows,
    shared_blks_hit,
    shared_blks_read,
    shared_blks_dirtied,
    shared_blks_written,
    local_blks_hit,
    local_blks_read,
    local_blks_dirtied,
    local_blks_written,
    temp_blks_read,
    temp_blks_written,
    shared_blk_read_time,
    shared_blk_write_time,
    local_blk_read_time,
    local_blk_write_time,
    temp_blk_read_time,
    temp_blk_write_time,
    wal_records,
    wal_fpi,
    wal_bytes,
    jit_functions,
    jit_generation_time,
    jit_inlining_count,
    jit_inlining_time,
    jit_optimization_count,
    jit_optimization_time,
    jit_emission_count,
    jit_emission_time,
    jit_deform_count,
    jit_deform_time,
    stats_since,
    minmax_stats_since
   FROM pg_stat_statements(true) pg_stat_statements(userid, dbid, toplevel, queryid, query, plans, total_plan_time, min_plan_time, max_plan_time, mean_plan_time, stddev_plan_time, calls, total_exec_time, min_exec_time, max_exec_time, mean_exec_time, stddev_exec_time, rows, shared_blks_hit, shared_blks_read, shared_blks_dirtied, shared_blks_written, local_blks_hit, local_blks_read, local_blks_dirtied, local_blks_written, temp_blks_read, temp_blks_written, shared_blk_read_time, shared_blk_write_time, local_blk_read_time, local_blk_write_time, temp_blk_read_time, temp_blk_write_time, wal_records, wal_fpi, wal_bytes, jit_functions, jit_generation_time, jit_inlining_count, jit_inlining_time, jit_optimization_count, jit_optimization_time, jit_emission_count, jit_emission_time, jit_deform_count, jit_deform_time, stats_since, minmax_stats_since);

SELECT v_forms_daily.company,
    v_forms_daily.aff_lookup,
    v_forms_daily.campaign_key,
    v_forms_daily.pacific_date,
    v_forms_daily.lead_count,
    'forms'::text AS traffic_type
   FROM v_forms_daily
UNION ALL
 SELECT v_coreg_daily.company,
    v_coreg_daily.aff_lookup,
    v_coreg_daily.campaign_key,
    v_coreg_daily.pacific_date,
    v_coreg_daily.lead_count,
    'coreg'::text AS traffic_type
   FROM v_coreg_daily;

SELECT company,
    aff_lookup,
    (company || aff_lookup) AS campaign_key,
    pacific_date,
    block_index,
        CASE
            WHEN (block_index = 0) THEN '12am–4am'::text
            WHEN (block_index = 1) THEN '4am–8am'::text
            WHEN (block_index = 2) THEN '8am–12pm'::text
            WHEN (block_index = 3) THEN '12pm–4pm'::text
            WHEN (block_index = 4) THEN '4pm–8pm'::text
            ELSE '8pm–12am'::text
        END AS block_label,
    leads AS lead_count
   FROM coreg_facts;

SELECT company,
    aff_lookup,
    (company || aff_lookup) AS campaign_key,
    pacific_date,
    (sum(leads))::bigint AS lead_count
   FROM coreg_facts
  GROUP BY company, aff_lookup, campaign_key, pacific_date;

SELECT m.company,
    c.aff_id AS aff_lookup,
    c.date_created,
    date(timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) AS pacific_date,
        CASE
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (0)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (3)::numeric)) THEN 0
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (4)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (7)::numeric)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (8)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (11)::numeric)) THEN 2
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (12)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (15)::numeric)) THEN 3
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (16)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (19)::numeric)) THEN 4
            ELSE 5
        END AS block_index
   FROM (tra_coreg_all c
     JOIN myprecious m ON (((m.aff_lookup = c.aff_id) AND (m.company = ANY (ARRAY['DATA'::text, 'DEBT'::text])))))
UNION ALL
 SELECT m.company,
    c.aff_id AS aff_lookup,
    c.date_created,
    date(timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) AS pacific_date,
        CASE
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (0)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (3)::numeric)) THEN 0
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (4)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (7)::numeric)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (8)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (11)::numeric)) THEN 2
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (12)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (15)::numeric)) THEN 3
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (16)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (19)::numeric)) THEN 4
            ELSE 5
        END AS block_index
   FROM (tra_coreg2026 c
     JOIN myprecious m ON (((m.aff_lookup = c.aff_id) AND (m.company = ANY (ARRAY['DATA'::text, 'DEBT'::text])))))
UNION ALL
 SELECT m.company,
    c.aff_id AS aff_lookup,
    c.date_created,

        CASE
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (0)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (3)::numeric)) THEN 0
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (4)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (7)::numeric)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (8)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (11)::numeric)) THEN 2
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (12)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (15)::numeric)) THEN 3
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (16)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (19)::numeric)) THEN 4
            ELSE 5
        END AS block_index
   FROM (dracoreg2026 c
     JOIN myprecious m ON (((m.aff_lookup = c.aff_id) AND (m.company = ANY (ARRAY['DATA'::text, 'DEBT'::text])))))
UNION ALL
 SELECT m.company,
    c.aff_id AS aff_lookup,
    c.date_created,
    date(timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) AS pacific_date,
        CASE
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (0)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (3)::numeric)) THEN 0
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (4)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (7)::numeric)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (8)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (11)::numeric)) THEN 2
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (12)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (15)::numeric)) THEN 3
            WHEN ((EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) >= (16)::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, c.date_created)) <= (19)::numeric)) THEN 4
            ELSE 5
        END AS block_index
   FROM (dra_coreg_all c
     JOIN myprecious m ON (((m.aff_lookup = c.aff_id) AND (m.company = ANY (ARRAY['DATA'::text, 'DEBT'::text])))));

WITH events_local AS (
         SELECT v_forms_events.company,
            v_forms_events.aff_lookup,
            timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, v_forms_events.date_created) AS pacific_ts
           FROM v_forms_events
        ), events_blocked AS (
         SELECT events_local.company,
            events_local.aff_lookup,
            events_local.pacific_ts,
            date(events_local.pacific_ts) AS pacific_date,
            EXTRACT(hour FROM events_local.pacific_ts) AS pacific_hour
           FROM events_local
        )
 SELECT company,
    aff_lookup,
    (company || aff_lookup) AS campaign_key,
    pacific_date,
        CASE
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (0)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (3)::numeric)) THEN 0
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (4)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (7)::numeric)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (8)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (11)::numeric)) THEN 2
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (12)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (15)::numeric)) THEN 3
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (16)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (19)::numeric)) THEN 4
            ELSE 5
        END AS block_index,
        CASE
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (0)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (3)::numeric)) THEN '12am–4am'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (4)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (7)::numeric)) THEN '4am–8am'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (8)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (11)::numeric)) THEN '8am–12pm'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (12)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (15)::numeric)) THEN '12pm–4pm'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (16)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (19)::numeric)) THEN '4pm–8pm'::text
            ELSE '8pm–12am'::text
        END AS block_label,
    count(*) AS lead_count
   FROM events_blocked
  GROUP BY company, aff_lookup, (company || aff_lookup), pacific_date,
        CASE
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (0)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (3)::numeric)) THEN 0
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (4)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (7)::numeric)) THEN 1
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (8)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (11)::numeric)) THEN 2
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (12)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (15)::numeric)) THEN 3
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (16)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (19)::numeric)) THEN 4
            ELSE 5
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (0)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (3)::numeric)) THEN '12am–4am'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (4)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (7)::numeric)) THEN '4am–8am'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (8)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (11)::numeric)) THEN '8am–12pm'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (12)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (15)::numeric)) THEN '12pm–4pm'::text
            WHEN ((pacific_hour >= (16)::numeric) AND (pacific_hour <= (19)::numeric)) THEN '4pm–8pm'::text
            ELSE '8pm–12am'::text
        END;

SELECT company,
    aff_lookup,
    (company || aff_lookup) AS campaign_key,
    date(timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, date_created)) AS pacific_date,
    count(*) AS lead_count
   FROM v_forms_events
  GROUP BY company, aff_lookup, (company || aff_lookup), (date(timezone('America/Los_Angeles'::text, date_created)));

SELECT 'tra'::text AS company,
        CASE
            WHEN (NULLIF(btrim("tra_5-0".off_id), ''::text) IS NULL) THEN btrim("tra_5-0".aff_id)
            ELSE (btrim("tra_5-0".aff_id) || btrim("tra_5-0".off_id))
        END AS aff_lookup,
    "tra_5-0".date_created
   FROM "tra_5-0"
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'tra'::text AS company,
        CASE
            WHEN (NULLIF(btrim(tra_forms_all.off_id), ''::text) IS NULL) THEN btrim(tra_forms_all.aff_id)
            ELSE (btrim(tra_forms_all.aff_id) || btrim(tra_forms_all.off_id))
        END AS aff_lookup,
    tra_forms_all.date_created
   FROM tra_forms_all
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'gt'::text AS company,
        CASE
            WHEN (NULLIF(btrim("gt_5-0".off_id), ''::text) IS NULL) THEN btrim("gt_5-0".aff_id)
            ELSE (btrim("gt_5-0".aff_id) || btrim("gt_5-0".off_id))
        END AS aff_lookup,
    "gt_5-0".date_created
   FROM "gt_5-0"
UNION ALL
 SELECT 'dra'::text AS company,
        CASE
            WHEN (NULLIF(btrim("dra_5-0".off_id), ''::text) IS NULL) THEN btrim("dra_5-0".aff_id)
            ELSE (btrim("dra_5-0".aff_id) || btrim("dra_5-0".off_id))
        END AS aff_lookup,
    "dra_5-0".date_created
   FROM "dra_5-0";

WITH ranked AS (
         SELECT mv_now_v2.company,
            mv_now_v2.campaign_key,
            mv_now_v2.aff_lookup,
            mv_now_v2.today_pacific_date,
            mv_now_v2.today_so_far AS acquired,
            mv_now_v2.current_block_index,
            mv_now_v2.blocks_fraction,
            mv_now_v2.lifetime_daily_avg AS baseline,
            (mv_now_v2.lifetime_daily_avg * mv_now_v2.blocks_fraction) AS expected_by_now,
            ((mv_now_v2.today_so_far)::numeric - (mv_now_v2.lifetime_daily_avg * mv_now_v2.blocks_fraction)) AS delta,
                CASE
                    WHEN ((mv_now_v2.lifetime_daily_avg * mv_now_v2.blocks_fraction) = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric
                    ELSE ((mv_now_v2.today_so_far)::numeric / (mv_now_v2.lifetime_daily_avg * mv_now_v2.blocks_fraction))
                END AS velocity,
            row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY mv_now_v2.company ORDER BY mv_now_v2.today_so_far DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
           FROM mv_now_v2
          WHERE (mv_now_v2.company = ANY (ARRAY['tra'::text, 'dra'::text, 'gt'::text, 'DATA'::text, 'DEBT'::text]))
        )
 SELECT company,
    campaign_key,
    aff_lookup,
    today_pacific_date,
    acquired,
    current_block_index,
    blocks_fraction,
    baseline,
    expected_by_now,
    delta,
    velocity,
    rn
   FROM ranked
  WHERE (rn <= 5)
  ORDER BY
        CASE company
            WHEN 'tra'::text THEN 1
            WHEN 'dra'::text THEN 2
            WHEN 'gt'::text THEN 3
            WHEN 'DATA'::text THEN 4
            WHEN 'DEBT'::text THEN 5
            ELSE 99
        END, rn;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (c.unique_case_id) c.unique_case_id,
    c.case_id,
    c.shop,
    c.vertical,
    c.first_name,
    c.last_name,
    c.full_name,
    c.state,
    c.source,
    c.sale_date,
    c.logics_date,
    c.logics_lead_created_date,
    c.transaction_id,
    c.aff_transaction_id,
    c.lead_id,
    c.gross_sale,
    c.total_payments,
    c.debt_amount,
    c.date_added,
    c.created_at,
    c.updated_at,
    s.snapshot_date,
    s.updated_total_payments AS current_total_payments,
    s.updated_gross_sale AS current_gross_sale,
    s.updated_amount_owed AS current_debt_amount,
    s.updated_status AS current_status,
    s.updated_payment_status AS current_payment_status,
    s.past_due_count,
    s.nsf_count,
    s.default_count
   FROM (sales.cases c
     LEFT JOIN sales.case_snapshots s ON ((s.unique_case_id = c.unique_case_id)))
  ORDER BY c.unique_case_id, s.snapshot_date DESC;

SELECT id,
    name,
    description,
    secret,
    convert_from(vault._crypto_aead_det_decrypt(message => decode(secret, 'base64'::text), additional => convert_to((id)::text, 'utf8'::name), key_id => (0)::bigint, context => '\x7067736f6469756d'::bytea, nonce => nonce), 'utf8'::name) AS decrypted_secret,
    key_id,
    nonce,
    created_at,
    updated_at
   FROM vault.secrets s;
